hooks.command: if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\-\-no-verify'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not skip git hooks with --no-verify' >&2; exit 1; fi

if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+add\s+.*\.env' && ! echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE '\.env\.example'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not stage .env files — secrets must not be committed' >&2; exit 1; fi; if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+add\s+.*\.(pem|key)$|git\s+add\s+.*credentials'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not stage secret files (credentials, .pem, .key)' >&2; exit 1; fi

FILE=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/"file_path":"//' | sed 's/"//'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.tsx?$'; then cd /Volumes/shorya/apps/circleso && ERRORS=$(npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1); if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then echo "tsc errors:"; echo "$ERRORS" | head -10; else echo "tsc: ok"; fi; fi; exit 0

PostToolUse.description: Run tsc type-check after editing TypeScript files (non-blocking)

hooks.command: cd /Volumes/shorya/apps/circleso && git diff --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '\.ts$|\.tsx$' && echo 'Reminder: TypeScript files were modified. Run npm run build before committing.' || true

Stop.description: Remind to build-check before session ends if TS files changed
